daily.today_energy: Your emotional radar is unusually sharp right now. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your superpower today. Channel that sensitivity into creating something meaningful, whether that's a conversation or a creative project.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, vulnerability is your love language today. Share something you've been holding back. Single? Someone's noticing your energy shift. Don't dim your light trying to seem less intense—that's literally your appeal.
daily.career: Your intuition about a project or person is spot-on. Speak up in meetings even if it feels risky. Your perspective brings something others are missing. This is your moment to show what you're really capable of.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding today—think long walks, warm tea, or anything that feels like a hug. Movement doesn't need to be intense; gentle and intentional beats forcing yourself through a tough workout.

weekly.overview: This week you're in your restoration era, Cancer. The cosmos is giving soft energy—time to tend to what matters most and release what's been weighing on your heart. Trust the quiet moments.
weekly.love: Someone's paying attention to the little things you do. Whether single or coupled, vulnerability is your superpower rn. Let people see the real you, messy and all. Connection deepens when masks come off.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. Don't sleep on that creative solution brewing in your mind—share it when you feel ready. Small wins compound. Focus on progress over perfection and watch momentum build.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness. Move in ways that feel good, not obligatory. Rest isn't laziness—it's part of your power-up sequence. Hydrate, journal, do whatever helps you feel grounded and present.
